title: Machine Learning for Time Series Classification: Challenges, Solutions, and Opportunities
description_es: Un enfoque comprehensivo sobre técnicas modernas de aprendizaje automático para clasificación de series temporales, incluyendo desafíos prácticos y soluciones innovadoras.
abstract: Time series classification remains a challenging task in machine learning. This comprehensive review examines state-of-the-art ML approaches, identifies key challenges, proposes solutions, and discusses future opportunities in the field.

citations.apa: Luengo, J., García-Gil, D., Triguero, I., & Herrera, F. (2024). Machine Learning for Time Series Classification: Challenges, Solutions, and Opportunities. Information Sciences, 681, 121098.
citations.mla: Luengo, Julián, et al. "Machine Learning for Time Series Classification: Challenges, Solutions, and Opportunities." Information Sciences, vol. 681, 2024, p. 121098.
